description: Fix JWT token expiry — tokens expire after 1h and the frontend doesn't silently refresh. Add refresh token logic to the auth middleware so users aren't kicked out mid-session.
successCriteria: No more 401 errors on active sessions

description: Build the Admin Settings page at /app/settings — branch management, email templates, branding config. Use existing page patterns from BranchManagementPage as a reference.
Write Playwright E2E tests for the AR Dashboard page — test that the dashboard loads, shows correct aging buckets, and the export button works.
